steps: Go to https://app.mercury.com and log in to your Mercury business banking account
Click your company logo or avatar in the top-left corner
Click 'API Tokens' in the settings sidebar (or go directly to https://app.mercury.com/settings/tokens)
Enter a descriptive name for the token
Select the token's permission level (read-only recommended for most integrations)
Copy the displayed token immediately — it will not be shown again
Store the token securely in a secrets manager or environment variable

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Mercury API token. Sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

notes: Mercury API token is shown only once — save it immediately upon generation
A stolen token can access your bank accounts — treat with extreme security care
Mercury requires a real US business bank account — not available for personal accounts
Read-only tokens are recommended for analytics and reporting integrations
Sandbox environment available for testing: https://sandbox.mercury.com — sandbox tokens are separate from production
Some operations (e.g., sending payments) may require additional account verification
Only users with appropriate account permissions can create API tokens

test_endpoint.description: List your Mercury bank accounts to verify the API token is valid
